subject: Defect map does not match image dimensions
body:
Hi everyone,

I am trying to apply a defect map during motion correction after pointing 
to it during creation of the settings files.

WarpTools fs_motion_and_ctf --settings warp_frameseries.settings --m_grid 
1x1x6 --c_grid 2x2x1 --c_range_max 6 --c_range_min 40 --c_use_sum 
--out_averages
However, I consistently get the following error:

System.Exception: Image dimensions don't match those of the defect map\n

When I check the headers of the frames, the gain reference, and the defect 
map, they all appear to be the same dimensions in X and Y. Both the gain 
reference and defect map were originally exported as .dm4 files, but I 
continue to get this error if I convert to .tif as well. When I convert the 
defect map to a .mrc, the motion correction job instead gets stuck at:

Connecting to workers...

I am able to process this dataset when I omit the defect map.

Thank you for any help!

Best,
Niharika
